title: Implement generic FieldVec<F: FiniteField> container (scalar)
description:
Implement the generic vector container for finite field elements, analogous to `BitVec` for GF(2) but over arbitrary fields.

```rust
pub struct FieldVec<F: FiniteField> {
    data: Vec<F>,
}
```

## Core operations (all scalar, no SIMD)

- Element access: `index`, `get`, `set`
- Arithmetic: `dot_product`, element-wise `add`, `sub`, `mul`, `scale`
- Functional: `map`, `fold`, `iter`, `zip_with`
- Conversion: `From<Vec<F>>`, `Into<Vec<F>>`
- Construction: `zeros(n, &F)` / `zeros(n)` (for `ConstField`)

## Linear-algebra-aware API design

The API must support efficient matrix operations in the downstream `FieldMatrix`:

- **Row-slice views**: `&FieldVec<F>` slices that reference contiguous row data without copying
- **Strided access**: Iterator adapters for column access in row-major matrices
- **Dot product signature**: Return `F::Wide` (unreduced accumulator) to allow the caller (matrix multiply kernel) to manage reduction scheduling across multiple dot products
- **Batch operations**: `axpy` (a*x + y) as a first-class operation — the fundamental BLAS-1 building block

## Location

`crates/gf2-core/src/field/vec.rs` (new file in the field module)

## Dependencies

- `FiniteField` trait (bfe0ba7b)

SIMD-accelerated specializations (delayed reduction, vectorized dot product) are tracked separately in 0fb99491.
